src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/UserListPage.j.general_idea: Changed the table layout strategy from fitting data with fill to fitting columns.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/UserPage.java.general_idea: Added import for Spring's ButtonTag class.
Added debug logging to track form submission events.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/entity/Data1.j.general_idea: Add Lombok @Data annotation to automatically generate getters, setters, toString, equals, and hashCode methods.
Add a 'name' field to the Data1 entity class.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/lib/Form.java.general_idea: Add debug logging to inspect the class name of the submitted consumer.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/lib/MyUtil.jav.general_idea: Consolidate multiple specific Spring request context imports into a single wildcard import.
Comment out a debug log statement that was likely used for temporary troubleshooting.
Replace StandardServletAsyncWebRequest with ServletWebRequest to use the standard synchronous request wrapper instead of the async variant.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/lib/Table.java.general_idea: Add @EqualsAndHashCode annotation to override default equality behavior by excluding the superclass fields.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 3.1.0 to 3.2.4 to align with newer ecosystem standards.
Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21.
Define a property for the JTE template engine version.
Add the JTE template engine library as a project dependency.
Update the Quarkus Qute core dependency from 3.1.2.Final to 3.2.2.Final.
Explicitly configure the Maven compiler plugin to use source/target 21 and enable preview features.
Add the JTE Maven plugin to generate template sources during the build.
Configure the Maven resources plugin to copy binary static content generated by JTE to the output directory.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Re-enable the default Spring Boot whitelabel error page for development or debugging purposes.
